events.name: TOKEN2049 Singapore
events.rationale: Overwhelmingly international adult delegates staying multiple nights; takes over all five floors of MBS. Past editions (2024, 2025) drove city-wide compression in CBD. Back-to-back with F1 weekend creates a 5-day compression window Oct 7-11.

events.name: Formula 1 Singapore Grand Prix
events.rationale: Strongest annual compression event for CBD/Quays properties; consistently materializes into sell-outs and peak ADR. Concert lineup (Lana Del Rey, The Killers, Janet Jackson, JJ Lin) adds regional overnight fans. Hold rates aggressively.

events.name: The Weeknd - After Hours Til Dawn Tour (2 nights)
events.rationale: Two-night stadium run; past mega stadium concerts (Taylor Swift 2024, Coldplay 2024) materialized into strong citywide occupancy from regional adult fans staying overnight. Adults-only positioning fits fan demographic.

events.name: BIGBANG 20th Anniversary Concert
events.rationale: First tour since 2017; reunion scarcity drives regional adult fans (now 25-40 demographic) to fly in and stay overnight. K-pop stadium shows have historically lifted weekend occupancy.

events.name: Post Malone Big Ass World Tour / Stray Kids weekend
events.rationale: Stadium-scale acts reported for the same late-September weekend; concentrated regional fly-in of adult concertgoers staying 1-2 nights near CBD.

events.name: Singapore International Energy Week (SIEW)
events.rationale: Week-long international delegate event; senior delegates book 4-5 star, but overflow of mid-tier corporate attendees benefits 3.5-star CBD aparthotels on weeknights. Sizeable regional day-visitor share caps upside.

events.name: BEX Asia (Built Environment Week)
events.rationale: Regional trade show with meaningful Malaysian/Indonesian overnight visitor share, but many local day attendees. Modest midweek corporate lift for CBD properties.

events.name: Submarine Networks World
events.rationale: Small but almost entirely international overnight delegates; adjacent to the Sept 25-26 stadium concert weekend, compounding midweek-to-weekend demand.
